sizing_rule.note: Recalculate optimal f whenever underlying price changes; adjust current position size to match new optimal f at new price level. Ensures position sizing always reflects current positive mathematical expectation. Uses TWR (Equation 4.18) for geometric mean calculation.

source_rule_text: Recalculate and adjust current position size to the new optimal f when market prices change, ensuring position sizing reflects the current positive mathematical expectation at the new price level.
